narration: Imagine a teaspoon of matter weighing billions of tons.

narration: That’s the reality of neutron stars, the remnants of supernova explosions.
visual_description: Context visual: That’s the reality of neutron stars, the remnants of supernova explosions.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: That’s the reality of neutron stars, the remnants of supernova explosions.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: That’s the reality of neutron stars, the remnants of supernova explosions.

narration: These stellar corpses pack more mass than our Sun into a sphere the size of a city.
visual_description: Escalation visual: These stellar corpses pack more mass than our Sun into a sphere the size of a city.

narration: One teaspoon of neutron star material could crush anything on Earth.
visual_description: Evidence visual: One teaspoon of neutron star material could crush anything on Earth.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: One teaspoon of neutron star material could crush anything on Earth.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: One teaspoon of neutron star material could crush anything on Earth.

narration: Their intense gravity creates bizarre phenomena, like pulsars—rotating stars emitting beams of radiation.
